services.description: From consulting to launch, I take care of everything
services.service1Desc: Showcase, e-commerce or corporate: a website that works for you.
services.service2Desc: Development of complex applications, SaaS, dashboards and business tools with modern technologies.
services.service3Desc: Appear first when your clients search near them.
services.service4Desc: Your website is slow or poorly ranked? I bring it back to life.
services.service5Desc: You manage your business, I take care of your website.
services.service6Desc: No one-size-fits-all recipe. A marketing strategy designed for you.

about.subtitle: Who am I
about.title: Behind the screen
about.paragraph1: I build digital projects with rigor, creativity, and a lot of listening.
about.paragraph2: My designs are timeless, built to last. Efficiency first, never superfluous. Every pixel has its purpose, every interaction is designed for the user.
about.paragraph3: A beautiful site is great. A site that attracts, convinces and converts is better.

testimonials.subtitle: They trust us
testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.description: Discover what our clients say about their experience and the results achieved.

1.content: My website finally reflects the seriousness of my practice. Perrine perfectly understood my professional ethics constraints and created an elegant site that inspires trust in my clients.
1.name: Marie L.

2.content: Our online bookings have increased by 40% since the new website. The integration of the interactive menu and booking system is flawless.
2.name: Thomas D.

3.content: A modern website that sets me apart from other firms. Local SEO has transformed my visibility: I now receive qualified inquiries every week.
3.name: Sophie M.

4.content: Finally visible on Google! My quote requests have doubled in 3 months. The portfolio showcases my work perfectly. Simple, effective, professional.
4.name: Jean-Pierre R.

5.content: Tight budget but professional result. Perrine understood our non-profit needs and delivered a website that facilitates our registrations and communication.
5.name: Claire B.

6.content: The integrated online appointment booking has changed my daily routine. Fewer phone calls, more time for my patients.
6.name: Karim A.

blogPreview.subtitle: News & Tips
blogPreview.title: Blog
blogPreview.description: Tips, tricks and news about web design, development and local SEO.

1.title: Local SEO 2026: How to Dominate Geolocated Searches
1.excerpt: Google My Business, local citations, customer reviews... The complete guide to being visible in your city and attracting qualified clients near you.

2.title: Web Design Trends 2026: What Will Change Everything
2.excerpt: Generative AI, immersive interfaces, micro-interactions... Discover the trends that will redefine web design in 2026.

3.title: Web Performance: Why Your Site Speed Impacts Your Sales
3.excerpt: Core Web Vitals, loading time, user experience... Every second counts. Discover how to optimize your site to convert more.

4.title: Vibe Coding: The 2025 Revolution and What's Next
4.excerpt: How vibe coding transformed web development in 2025, and why 2026 promises to be even more disruptive.

5.title: Major Design Events of 2025: A Year in Review
5.excerpt: From Figma Config to Awwwards, the highlights that shaped the design community this year.

6.title: AI and Web Creation: Where Do We Really Stand in Late 2025?
6.excerpt: State of AI in website creation: what works, what disappoints, and how to use it wisely.

faqPreview.subtitle: Frequently asked questions
faqPreview.title: FAQ
faqPreview.description: Answers to the most common questions about my services and work process.

1.question: How long does it take to create a website?
1.answer: The creation timeline depends on the project's complexity. A simple showcase site can be delivered in 2-3 weeks, while an e-commerce site or custom web application may take 6 to 12 weeks.

2.question: How does local SEO work?
2.answer: Local SEO helps optimize your visibility for specific local searches. I work on content optimization, meta tags, and creating targeted pages by city or geographic area to improve your local rankings.

3.question: Do you offer maintenance services?
3.answer: Yes, I offer monthly maintenance packages including updates, security, backups and technical support.

4.question: What are your rates?
4.answer: My rates vary depending on the nature and scope of the project. I provide personalized quotes after an initial discussion to fully understand your needs. Feel free to contact me to discuss your project.
